specific_question: When did Elexion start introducing ADAS technology in their electric vehicles?
answer: The first Elexion electric vehicle models that included advanced driver-assisted systems were released in October 2023. Some ADAS features were implemented into existing models in the following months.
dr_question: How well is Elexion positioned to adapt to and take advantage of AI and machine learning to advance our ADAS technology by June 2026 while providing a friendly end-user experience for our drivers?
